# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Design a broader policy framework for a repository that does not yet have canonical homes for status or history detail.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The main problem is broader policy design rather than document authority or ownership, and the repo still lacks canonical homes for the detail.
## Expected object
A deflection toward a policy-design or planning skill, not a source-of-truth decision.

The task is only about building or maintaining a derived docs surface; that belongs in a separate review-surface workflow.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this skill when the task is about inventing a new policy framework or when the canonical homes for status/history detail do not exist yet.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid authority language and should not force a document-ownership answer onto a policy-design question. It should also note that summary-doc trimming would be premature without canonical homes.
